blossoms.note: Sustained AI-assisted writing and publishing work — markdown-to-WordPress and translation pipelines feeding reisememo.ch, travelmemo.com and LinkedIn articles.
Sustained automation work since 2025 — the public Flickr-to-Instagram content pipeline plus photo-metadata and note-workflow tooling gluing the blogs' content ops together.
Sustained SEO tooling work since early 2025 — Google Knowledge Graph retrieval pipelines applied to travelmemo.com and reisememo.ch.
Sustained GEO practice since early 2025 — programmatic entity maps (ontology, taxonomy, Schema.org) generated by entity-map and shipped across webmemo.ch, travelmemo.com and reisememo.ch.
Designed and shipped the AI Learning Tree pipeline — nightly harvester, deterministic generator, interactive 3D renderer — built through sustained AI pair-programming.
